author: Srushti S.
pros: OfficePortal helped us automate our HR processes including attendance, payroll, employee records, and timesheets. The reporting and dashboard features are very useful for management. The UI is professional and designed for large organizations. We were looking for an employee monitoring and productivity tracking solution, and OfficePortal turned out to be the right choice. The UI is modern and built to handle large organizations with multiple departments. The reporting, analytics, and employee performance tracking features are very useful for management.
cons: Nothing as such at the moment. Team is available keen and available for any customisation if required.

review_title: Reliable HRMS tool with strong support and minor login issues overall good experience.
description: Overall experience is good team is supportive system is easy to use and helps manage tasks efficiently.
author: Sapna T.
pros: Great support team always responsive helpful and quick to resolve issues making work smooth daily...
cons: Occasional login glitches cause delays and inconvenience but usually get resolved after retrying again, but the support team is always at rescue.

review_title: One Stop Solution | Very Efficient And Productive
author: Monali Z.
pros: Office Portal is packed with features, so it is a good software to use for that reason and I would definitely recommend that you give it a try.Easy to use ,visibility about list of holiday or you want to apply to leave , east to track the application.you can download play slips,
cons: Right now there is nothing much to dislike, every option and feature is relatable.

description: As i mentioned OfficePortal’s employee monitoring software gives us clear visibility of employee work, login time, productivity, and application usage. The dashboard UI is very professional and designed for scalability, which is important for growing companies like ours. We highly recommend OfficePortal for companies looking for employee monitoring and productivity improvement. We have been using OfficePortal for HRMS and employee management as well. Attendance, leave, payroll, and employee monitoring are all integrated into one system. This has reduced our manual work and improved HR efficiency.
author: Disha M.
pros: OfficePortal’s employee monitoring software gives us clear visibility of employee work, login time, productivity, and application usage.
cons: Certainly, there is maintenance or system updation on the portal once or twice a month, which may impact work on the office portal.

review_title: Efficient Call Management Solution for Growing Teams
description: Our overall experience has been excellent. OfficePortal Call Tracker has significantly improved our ability to manage and monitor team performance. It has streamlined our operations, increased accountability, and enhanced productivity across both sales and support teams.
author: Nitin S.
pros: The most valuable feature is the centralized dashboard that provides complete visibility of call data, including call duration, number of calls, and employee performance. It helps us monitor productivity in real time and make informed decisions. The interface is clean, user-friendly, and works smoothly even with a large team.
cons: There is very little to dislike, but adding more customization options in reports and advanced filtering features would make the platform even more powerful.

author: Pravin M.
pros: OfficePortal offers a clean and intuitive interface, making navigation easy for daily tasks. The centralized dashboard, quick access to reports, and smooth coordination between team members significantly improve productivity and reduce communication gaps.
cons: Some features feel slightly slow and require multiple steps to complete simple actions. But overall is good
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: We have been using OfficePortal for HRMS and employee management. Attendance, leave, payroll, and employee monitoring are all integrated into one system. This has reduced our manual work and improved HR efficiency.
author: Romil J.
cons: As such there is no negative point with office portal hrms
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The Best & all in one HRMS Software
description: The overall experience with OfficePortal has been very good. They have all the required features necessary right from onboarding a new employee, attendance, self-service, compensation, task managemnt,payslip generation, employee productivity, performance management , workflow, expenses & reimbursements and lot more.
author: Janak C.
pros: All The features are very good and quite simple to use such as Employees, Attendance, leaves, Payroll , performance management, asset management, task management. Moreover, my employees also love using OfficePortal and it is not always about the Proprietor but the overall organization. It has helped us streamline several processes in the organization. The Experience with OfficePortal support team was excellent as they helped us with the entire setup to start with them. Also, it is very easy to reach the support team , who provide quick resolutions to our queries/issues.
cons: No Cons. OfficePortal has all the features for an efficient employee management system

author: Lavin K.
pros: the standout features of OfficePortal are its high level of customization, cloud-based storage for employee data, comprehensive tools for attendance tracking and leave management, productivity monitoring capabilities, and seamless performance cycle management. Additionally, the accessibility of data from anywhere and the responsiveness of the support team were highlighted as positive aspects.
cons: there wasn't any mention of specific shortcomings or areas for improvement with OfficePortal. It's possible that the user had a very positive experience overall and didn't encounter any significant issues or drawbacks.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Has made employee productivity monitoring and payroll management very easy.
author: Sarfaraz A.
pros: User friendly employee & payroll management with great customer support
cons: None... have not encountered anything that qualifies to be stated here.

review_title: The Best Dashboard for Remote Workforce Monitoring
author: Abdus Salam W.
pros: The best part of OfficePortal is its powerful dashboard and reporting system. We use the Employee Monitoring module daily to track team productivity and performance. The system is stable and the UI is designed to handle large teams without confusion. It is a very good solution for companies with remote or hybrid employees.
cons: The initial setup for the advanced monitoring filters can be time-consuming, and the mobile app doesn't yet offer the full depth of the desktop's powerful reporting suite

review_title: OfficePortal Review: Powerful Call Tracking & Smart Employee Monitoring Solution
description: OfficePortal Monitoring module has made employee performance tracking very easy for our organization. The user interface is clean and designed in such a way that even with a large team, the system remains fast and easy to use. The productivity reports and activity tracking features help our management team make better decisions.
author: Pavithra S.
pros: The Call Tracker module in OfficePortal is very useful for companies with sales and support teams. We can track inbound and outbound calls, call duration, and employee performance. The analytics and reporting features help us measure team efficiency and productivity.
cons: OfficePortal HRMS is a complete employee management system for attendance, leave management, payroll, and employee records. Earlier we were using multiple Excel sheets, but now everything is in one system. The UI is well designed and works well for companies with a large number of employees.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The customer support team at OfficePortal is exceptional - they are responsive and knowledgeable, always ready to assist with any questions or issues that arise. Overall, I highly recommend OfficePortal HRMS to any business looking for a reliable, user-friendly, and all-encompassing HR management software
author: Anurag M.
pros: I recently started using OfficePortal HRMS and I am thoroughly impressed with its functionality and ease of use. The software is comprehensive and covers all aspects of HR management, from recruitment to performance evaluation to payroll processing.
cons: The interface is intuitive, making it easy to navigate through the various features and functions. I appreciate the customizable dashboard, which allows me to tailor the software to my specific needs and preferences.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Rajendra P.
pros: Easy to access, excellent support From support team
cons: Need to provide live tracking of employees and need to provide axis Bank format For execute payroll.
